hero.name: Gilbert
hero.description: I'm a web developer and designer based in Kigali, Rwanda, focused on building modern websites, full-stack web applications, and clear digital experiences for startups, brands, and growing businesses. I'm currently training as a Software Engineering Fellow at A2SV (Africa to Silicon Valley), where I build scalable, real-world web applications with strong UI and frontend quality.

about.title: About
about.description: I'm a Kigali, Rwanda-based frontend and full-stack developer with a strong interest in modern web development, web design, UI/UX design, and music production. I am currently a Software Engineering Fellow at A2SV (Africa to Silicon Valley), where I train in data structures, algorithms, system design, and real-world problem solving. I enjoy turning ideas into scalable, high-performance digital products through clean code, thoughtful design, and responsive website experiences.

expertiseDescription.frontend: Building responsive and interactive user interfaces with modern frameworks and libraries.
expertiseDescription.uiux: Creating beautiful and intuitive designs that improve user experience and engagement.
expertiseDescription.music: Producing high-quality music and audio content for media and entertainment projects.

education.degree: Planned Double Major in BSc Computer Science and BSc Applied Physics

services.title: My Services
services.description: I offer a comprehensive range of digital services to help bring your ideas to life. From web development to creative design and audio production.

serviceList.title: Web Development
serviceList.description: Custom websites and web applications built with modern technologies and best practices.

serviceList.title: UI/UX Design
serviceList.description: Beautiful and intuitive user interfaces that provide exceptional user experiences.

serviceList.title: Music Production
serviceList.description: Professional music production services for various media and entertainment projects.

serviceList.title: Full-Stack Development
serviceList.description: End-to-end web solutions including frontend, backend, and database development.

serviceList.title: Mobile-First Design
serviceList.description: Responsive designs optimized for mobile devices and progressive web applications.

serviceList.title: Audio Services
serviceList.description: Professional audio editing, mixing, and mastering for podcasts and multimedia content.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A showcase of my recent work across web development, design, and audio production. Each project reflects a different challenge and solution.
projects.listHeading: Enter a project number or a project name to get more info.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Looking for a web developer or web designer in Kigali, Rwanda? I'd love to hear about your website, product, or redesign project. Send me a message and I'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.connectDescription: I'm always open to new opportunities in frontend development, full-stack web apps, website design, UI/UX work, and freelance collaborations in Kigali and beyond.
contact.sentDescription: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorSubmit: Error submitting form, please try again.

footer.description: I'm a passionate developer and creative professional who loves crafting exceptional digital experiences through thoughtful web development, strong design, and creative content.
footer.popupSeoSummary: Gilbert Tuyambaze creates responsive websites, portfolio experiences, and business-focused web interfaces for clients searching for a web developer in Kigali, Rwanda. This popup adds strong location and service context without taking permanent space in the footer.
footer.popupSearchHint: If someone searches for Tuyambaze, Gilbert, Kigali design, Kigali Rwanda web design, Rwanda frontend developer, portfolio website developer Kigali, website designer in Rwanda, or frontend engineer in Kigali, this section helps connect those terms to the work, skills, and contact information shown across the site.
footer.faqDescription: Extra search-friendly content for people looking for a Kigali, Rwanda web developer or web designer.

faq.question: Who is Gilbert Tuyambaze?
faq.answer: I'm a web developer and designer based in Kigali, Rwanda, and I build responsive portfolio sites, business websites, polished UI systems, and modern frontend experiences.

faq.question: What services does this portfolio highlight?
faq.answer: This portfolio highlights my work in web design in Kigali, Rwanda, frontend development, landing pages, portfolio websites, business websites, UI refinement, and full-stack implementation support.

faq.question: What searches can help people find me?
faq.answer: People can find me through searches like Gilbert Tuyambaze, Tuyambaze Gilbert, Kigali web developer, Kigali Rwanda web design, Rwanda frontend developer, and web designer in Kigali.

faq.question: Why is this content in a popup?
faq.answer: I keep this content in a popup so the footer stays compact while still adding helpful context about my work, location, and services when someone wants more detail.

legal.title: Copyright Notice
legal.content: All original portfolio content on this website, including text, interface ideas, project descriptions, branding, custom visuals, code samples shared for presentation, and layout presentation, is the intellectual property of Gilbert Tuyambaze unless stated otherwise. Unauthorized copying, resale, or redistribution of original content without permission is not allowed.

legal.title: Terms And Conditions
legal.content: This portfolio is provided for professional presentation, portfolio review, hiring discussions, and service inquiries. Visitors may browse, share the site link, and contact Gilbert Tuyambaze for collaboration or project work. Misuse, impersonation, scraping for harmful purposes, or reproduction of protected material without consent is prohibited.

legal.title: Privacy And Contact Data
legal.content: If you contact Gilbert Tuyambaze through the portfolio, shared details such as your name, email address, subject, and message are used only for communication, project discussion, and client follow-up. Personal information is not intentionally sold or shared for unrelated marketing purposes.

legal.title: Security And Responsible Use
legal.content: Reasonable efforts are made to keep this portfolio secure, responsive, and safe to use across modern devices. Visitors should avoid attempting unauthorized access, automated abuse, spam, or disruptive actions. Any third-party links, social platforms, or external services remain subject to their own security and privacy practices.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

pwa.installDescription: Save it to your device for quicker access and app-like browsing.

console.ready: System ready. Type help to begin.
console.help:
Available commands:
help, clear, minimize, exit
sections, goto <section>
hero, about, gilbert, images, image <name|number>, education, services
projects, project <name|number>, gallery
contact, socials, resume, cv
open <project>, github <project>
message, send message

Profile guide:
- Type hero to see the hero summary, achievements, strengths, and recent work
- Type gilbert to see about me and personal images
- Type images to list Gilbert's portraits and branding visuals
- Then enter an image number or image name to expand it
- Type education to see education and certifications

Projects guide:
- Run or click projects to list all project names
- Then type a project name or a project number for more details

Project matching understands numbers, partial names, token swaps, loose typing, and approximate names.
Terminal message mode prompts step by step: name > email > subject > message > confirm.
Type cancel anytime to stop.

Examples:
- help
- education
- projects
- project 1
console.sections:
Sections:
- home
- about
- services
- projects
- gallery
- contact
console.gotoFailure: Unknown section: {{section}}. Use sections to list valid targets.
console.about:
I'm Gilbert Tuyambaze.
I'm a frontend and full-stack developer, UI/UX designer, and creative technologist.
I'm currently training as a Software Engineering Fellow at A2SV.
My core stack includes React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, and Tailwind CSS.
console.education:
Education & Certifications
- Software Engineering Fellowship | A2SV (Africa to Silicon Valley) | 2026 - Present
- Planned Double Major in BSc Computer Science and BSc Applied Physics | University | 2025 - Present
- Full Stack Web Development | Coding Bootcamp | 2024 - 2025
- Music Production Certificate | Audio Institute | 2024
console.hero:
Hero Overview
I'm a frontend and full-stack developer focused on modern, responsive, and polished web experiences.
Highlights: I'm an A2SV Software Engineering Fellow, I've shipped multiple portfolio and client platforms, and I've built solid experience across web apps, branding, and creative technology.
I'm strongest in React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, UI polish, responsive interfaces, and turning ideas into clean product experiences.
My recent work includes marketplace systems, academic resource platforms, private chat apps, consulting websites, and personal portfolio builds.
console.gilbert:
Gilbert Hub
I'm a Kigali-based frontend and full-stack developer, UI/UX designer, and creative technologist.
I build modern interfaces, scalable web applications, and smooth user experiences with React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, and Tailwind CSS.

What you can open next:
- hero: my achievements, strengths, and recent work
- about: my short professional summary
- education: my education and certifications
- contact: my email, phone, and guided terminal message

Project shortcuts:
{{projects}}

Next step:
Type hero, about, education, contact, projects, or images.
You can also type project followed by a project number or project name for more details.

socialProof.title: Testimonials and feedback from people I worked with
socialProof.description: This section brings together testimonials and direct feedback from clients, collaborators, and teams so visitors can quickly understand the experience of working with me.
socialProof.emptyDescription: The form below is live, so the first shared message will appear here once it is submitted.

form.title: Send a testimonial or feedback
form.kind: What do you want to share?
form.name: Name
form.placeholder: Describe what it was like to work with me or share your honest feedback.
form.success: Thank you. Your message is now part of the social proof stream.
form.error: Your message could not be saved. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Portfolio command dashboard
dashboard.description: Signed in as {{email}}. From here you can control visitor numbers, inspect submitted messages, and manage public testimonials and feedback.
dashboard.setupDescription: Add the Firebase values to your environment, enable Firestore and Firebase Authentication, then create the admin role document for your user.
dashboard.roleDescription: This account is signed in, but it does not have the admin role yet. Create the matching roles/{uid} document in Firestore to unlock the dashboard.
dashboard.summaryText: Use this deck to keep the public social proof fresh, hide entries you no longer want visible, and edit wording when you need a cleaner presentation.
dashboard.emptySocial: No testimonials or feedback stored yet.

errors.login: Login failed. Check your admin credentials and Firebase Auth setup.
errors.load: Dashboard data could not be loaded. Check your admin role, Firestore rules, and Functions deployment.
